template_text: This is CBI headquarters New Delhi. Your Aadhaar number has been used to send a package containing illegal substances from Mumbai to Cambodia. You are hereby under digital arrest. Do not disconnect this call or inform anyone. Stay on video call until further instruction.

I am an ED officer from the Enforcement Directorate. Your bank account is linked to a money laundering case worth 20 crore. You are under digital arrest. Switch on your camera immediately and do not tell anyone, not even your family, or you will face judicial custody.

This is Mumbai Cyber Police. An FIR has been registered against your name in a drug trafficking case. To avoid immediate arrest you must remain on this video call under digital surveillance and verify your bank funds by transferring them to a secure RBI account.

CBI cyber wing speaking. Your SIM card was used in a terror funding investigation. A non-bailable warrant has been issued. You are under digital arrest — remain visible on camera 24 hours. Pay the case settlement bond of 2 lakh to close the warrant.

Delhi Police headquarters. Your phone number appeared in a human trafficking chargesheet. You must cooperate with digital custody procedure. Do not leave your house, keep the video call running, and share your bank statement for verification.

Enforcement Directorate Mumbai zone. Shares purchased from your PAN are part of a hawala racket. Judicial custody order is ready. To apply for virtual bail you must deposit a refundable security of 3.5 lakh within 2 hours. Stay on video call.

You have received a notice from CBI Interpol division. Your identity was found in an international parcel with 400 grams of MDMA. This call is being recorded for Supreme Court. You are under digital arrest — connect on Skype now and do not inform anyone.

This is the cyber crime branch. A case of obscene content sharing is registered on your number. To avoid public arrest and media coverage, remain under digital arrest on this call and transfer funds for forensic verification. Amount is fully refundable.

This is Indian Customs Department. A parcel registered under your mobile number has been seized at Delhi airport. It contains 2 kg of narcotics and Rs 50 lakh in foreign currency. To avoid arrest, you must pay a customs fine of Rs 85,000 immediately.

FedEx courier verification department. Your international parcel to Taiwan was intercepted with 5 fake passports and drugs. Call is being transferred to Mumbai Customs officer. Pay clearance penalty now or an arrest warrant will be executed today.

Customs office Chennai port. A consignment in your name contains undeclared gold worth 32 lakh. GST evasion case will be filed unless you settle the duty amount through the payment link sent to your WhatsApp within one hour.

This is DHL customer care with Customs on line. Your parcel from Malaysia has laboratory chemicals used in drug manufacturing. Your Aadhaar is now flagged. Pay the release and legal processing charge of Rs 45,500 or face NDPS Act prosecution.

Airport cargo division speaking. A box shipped using your identity contains 40 ATM cards and counterfeit currency. The case can be settled at the preliminary stage. Transfer the compounding fee to the officer account shared on SMS.

Your shipment is on hold at Bengaluru foreign post office due to customs duty of Rs 12,480. If unpaid in 4 hours the parcel will be reported to narcotics control and your number handed to police. Pay via the UPI ID shared now.

This is TRAI, Telecom Regulatory Authority of India. Your mobile number will be disconnected in 2 hours because illegal advertising messages were sent from it. Press 9 to speak to an officer and prevent disconnection of all numbers on your Aadhaar.

TRAI head office Delhi. A complaint of harassment messaging is registered against your SIM. Your KYC documents were misused. Number suspension order is issued. To file objection connect with the police verification desk and share your details now.

Automated alert from telecom department: your number is linked to unlawful activity in Mumbai. All services will be terminated within 24 hours. To verify identity and stop termination, provide the OTP received on your phone to our officer.

This is the TRAI enforcement cell. A second SIM issued on your identity in Jharkhand was used for cyber fraud. Your primary number will be blocked today. Stay on the line for Mumbai cyber cell — do not disconnect this call.

Final notice from telecom authority. Due to non-verification of documents your mobile will be deactivated tonight. To keep your number active pay the re-verification charge of Rs 10 and enter your card details on the link sent by SMS.

Your Aadhaar card has been used to open 3 bank accounts involved in money laundering in Rajasthan. This is the police verification cell. Confirm your Aadhaar number and pay the identity protection deposit to freeze the fraudulent accounts.

UIDAI security division. Someone in Bihar has duplicated your Aadhaar and taken loans of 6 lakh. A cheating case may be filed against you. To prove innocence, complete video verification and share your bank balance details with the investigating officer.

This is cyber police station. Your Aadhaar-linked mobile was found in a SIM box operation used for international scam calls. To de-link your identity from the case records immediately pay the document verification charge through UPI.

Alert: your Aadhaar biometrics were used at a border checkpoint by a wanted person. National security case initiated. Do not tell anyone about this call. Cooperate with the officer joining this line and keep your camera on for identification.

Dear customer, your bank KYC has expired and your account will be blocked today. To continue banking services click the link and update PAN immediately, or call this number and share the OTP received for instant re-activation.

This is your bank credit card division. Suspicious transaction of Rs 89,999 is on hold. To cancel the transaction verify your card number, CVV and the one time password now, otherwise the amount will be debited in 10 minutes.

Your UPI account will be suspended due to incomplete KYC. Download the screen support app from the SMS link so our executive can complete verification remotely, and keep your banking app open during the process.

PayTM wallet service center. Your wallet KYC points expire tonight and Rs 14,500 cashback will lapse. To claim, accept the collect request we send on UPI and enter your PIN — this is a zero-debit verification transaction.

Income Tax Department refund cell. You have an approved refund of Rs 32,480 pending since last assessment year. Confirm your bank account number and IFSC on this call to receive the amount within 30 minutes.

Dear taxpayer, your ITR refund failed due to bank mismatch. Click the secure link to re-validate your account and enter net banking credentials. The refund of Rs 51,200 will lapse today if not claimed.

This is the GST refund helpdesk. Your business is eligible for an input credit refund of Rs 1,04,000. Pay the processing and gateway charge of Rs 2,999 now to release the refund to your registered account today itself.
